div.p: DataPoint[T] Self-contained data unit with audit trail
• id: NanoId • payload: T • actor: ActorEntry • temporal: Bitemporal • trigger: Trigger • context: Context • references: []Reference • causes: []Cause
• Kind: ActorKind • Id: ID[T] • Name: string
[]ActorEntry[T] • Origin() - first actor • Current() - last actor
• validFrom: Timestamp • validUntil: Timestamp • recorded: Timestamp • correction: bool
• environment: string • session: string • request: string • source: string
• id: T • relation: string • version: int
• id: NanoId • kind: string • effect: string
• Length: 8-256 chars • Default: 21 chars (126 bits) • FIPS-140 compatible
ID[B, V] Branded phantom type ID
Prevents mixing entity IDs at compile time

pre.code: type UserBrand struct{} type UserID = ID[UserBrand, string]
